C1_splitting_pattern.conclusion: 3 distinct masses require orthorhombic (3 inequivalent axes): T1u -> B1u+B2u+B3u; generations <-> axes x,y,z

C2_linear_crystal_field_ruled_out.verdict: splitting >= mean -> NOT a perturbation; linear (in m) crystal field cannot produce the observed ratios

C4_equipartition_45deg.reading: the cubic-scalar (A1g) and symmetry-breaking (T1u) parts of sqrt(m) carry EQUAL weight

C6_Z3_cube_parametrisation.note: sqrt(m) = M0[1 + sqrt2 cos(delta+2pi a/3)] -- the cube's threefold (Z3 body-diagonal) phase structure; sqrt2<=>Q=2/3

context_quark_Q.note: not 2/3 -> charged leptons are the special clean case; quark/neutrino fit is OPEN
